steps.t: Uya Hujûm can be found in north-eastern North Ithilien. Tordoron has asked you to assault the Khundolar encampment of Uya Hujûm.
Tordoron can be found in the northern wilds of North Ithilien. You have routed the Khundolar encamped in North Ithilien and should now report to Tordo…
Anborn can be found at Henneth Annûn. You have routed the Khundolar threat within North Ithilien and should now return to Anborn.
